title: The Sound of Echoes (Speed of Sound Thriller, #2)
author: Eric Bernt
targetAudience: Readers who enjoy thrillers and suspense novels, particularly those interested in crime and psychological elements
relatedBooks: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
keyInsights: Explores the impact of sound on perception and reality
Highlights the psychological aspects of fear and suspense
Emphasizes the importance of resilience in the face of danger
